docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY TANG, NAN AS TO DEFENDANT PILLAY, DEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-23-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PILLAY, DEVEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF NAN TANG IS PRESENT APPEARING WITH WITNESS JUN DAVIS. DEFENDANT DEVEN PILLAY IS PRESENT. BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND HER WITNESS ARE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AI DONG NI, OATH ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT PILLAY, DEVEN MAILED TO RESPONDENT TANG, NAN
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
DECLARATION ABOUT HEARING PROCESS FILED BY DEFENDANT PILLAY, DEVEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, NAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PILLAY, DEVEN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,125.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR APR-02-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-02-2026 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (D206)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF APR-02-2026 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON APR-02-2026 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 611, JUDGE ALEXANDRA ROBERT GORDON. (D206)
MINUTES FOR APR-02-2026 9:30 AM

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR - TRIAL IS HELD ON APR-02-2026 - MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL ON APR-09-2026 AT 3:00 PM IN DEPT. 611. JUDGE ALEXANDRA ROBERT GORDON, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE, NOT REPORTED.
MINUTES FOR APR-09-2026 3:00 PM
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-09-2026 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT TANG, NAN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PILLAY, DEVEN $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,325.00 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
